# Faded Inc. — Salem, OR
> Faded Inc. is a barbershop in Salem, Oregon for fades, classic cuts, beard trims and hot-towel shaves. Bilingual (English/Spanish). 675 Orchard Heights Rd NW #250. A West Salem barbershop on Orchard Heights — skin fades and beard detailing.

## Services
- Haircuts & Fades
- Beard & Line-up
- Hot-Towel Shave
- Kids' Cuts
- Designs & Details

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97304)

## Contact
- Hours: Walk-ins & appointments — call for today's hours · Languages: English, Español
